
---
title: "Synthesis: Rhone synthetic case"
author: "Felipe"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  echo = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 2.5,
  fig.height = 2.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r load-packages, message = FALSE, include= FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

main_folder <- "/home/famendezrios/Documents/These/VSCODE-R/HydroBayes/HydroBayes_git/scripts/Case_studies/Synthetic_case/Rhone/Calibration_experiments/"
data_folder <- "/home/famendezrios/Documents/These/VSCODE-R/HydroBayes/HydroBayes_git/data"
```
```{r}
function_list <- list.files("/home/famendezrios/Documents/These/VSCODE-R/HydroBayes/HydroBayes_git/R/", full.names = TRUE)
for (i in function_list) {
  source(i)
}

plot_DIC_guided <- function(
    dir_polynomial,
    DIC_criterion = "DIC3") {
  all_files <- unlist(
    lapply(dir_polynomial, list.files,
      recursive = TRUE,
      full.names = TRUE
    )
  )

  DIC_path_Files <- all_files[grep(all_files, pattern = "Results_DIC.txt")]
  if (length(DIC_path_Files) == 0) stop("Any Results_DIC.txt file was found")
  DIC_results <- c()

  for (i in 1:length(DIC_path_Files)) {
    DIC_by_degree <- read.table(DIC_path_Files[i], col.names = c("Criteria", "Value"))
    # Match the criterion chosen
    DIC_by_degree <- DIC_by_degree[which(DIC_by_degree[, 1] == DIC_criterion), ]
    # Assign the polynomial degree
    extraction <- strsplit(DIC_path_Files[i], "/")[[1]][15]
    # # Extraire le chiffre après le underscore
    # chiffre <- sub(".*_(\\d+)", "\\1", extraction)

    # # Convertir en numérique (optionnel)
    DIC_by_degree$case <- extraction

    DIC_results <- rbind(DIC_results, DIC_by_degree)
  }
  min_local <- DIC_results[which.min(DIC_results$Value), ]

  # Vérifier la présence des motifs
  if (!all(str_detect(DIC_results$case, "Kmin_n_"))) {
    stop("Erreur : certaines lignes n'ont pas 'Kmin_n_' !")
  }

  if (!all(str_detect(DIC_results$case, "Kflood_n_"))) {
    stop("Erreur : certaines lignes n'ont pas 'Kflood_n_' !")
  }

  DIC_plot <- ggplot(DIC_results, aes(x = factor(case), y = Value, col = factor(Criteria))) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    geom_point(data = min_local, aes(x = , factor(case), y = Value), col = "blue", size = 3) +
    annotate("segment",
      x = factor(min_local$Degree), y = min_local$Value * 1.005, xend = factor(min_local$Degree), yend = min_local$Value * 1.002,
      linewidth = 2, linejoin = "mitre",
      arrow = arrow(type = "closed", length = unit(0.01, "npc"))
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      x = "Calibration case",
      y = "Value",
      col = "Criterion",
      title = "DIC criterion :",
      subtitle = "Comparison of several polynomial degrees"
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    )

  return(DIC_plot)
}
```

# Synthetic case: Rhone 

## Description
### Geometry and reaches distribution
- Prismatic channel
- The main channel and floodplain's geometry is rectangular 
- Hydraulic model: 3 reaches
- Calibration method: 2 typologies (Main channel (MC) and tributary (TR))
  - MC: 1 Spatial Unit (SU)
  - TR: 1 SU
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(data_folder, "data-raw/Synthetic_case/Rhone/PamHYR_synthetic/plan.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(data_folder, "data-raw/Synthetic_case/Rhone/PamHYR_synthetic/decoupage.png"))
```
```{r,fig.width = 5.5,fig.height = 3}
file_RUGFILE_synt_obs <- file.path(data_folder, "processed_data/Synthetic_case/Rhone/TRUE_RUGFile.RUG")
Real_Ks_simulated <- read_fortran_data(
  file_path = file_RUGFILE_synt_obs,
  col_widths_RUGFile = c(1, 3, 6, 10, 10, 10, 10),
  skip = 1
)

Kmin_literature <- data.frame(
  x_start = Real_Ks_simulated$KP_start,
  x_end = Real_Ks_simulated$KP_end,
  mean_value = Real_Ks_simulated$Kmin,
  typology = ifelse(Real_Ks_simulated$id_reach == 1 | Real_Ks_simulated$id_reach == 2, "MR", "TR")
)

Kmin_segment_layer <- segment_layer_reference(
  K_literature = Kmin_literature,
  mean_col = "mean_value",
  min_col = NULL,
  max_col = NULL
)
ggplot() +
  Kmin_segment_layer +
  ggplot2::scale_linetype_manual(
    name = "Reference values",
    values = c(
      "mean" = "dashed",
      "min" = "dashed",
      "max" = "dashed"
    ),
    labels = c("synthetic data")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Streamwise position (m)",
    y = "Friction coefficient"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~typology, scales = "free", ncol = 1)
```

### Modelling
- Uniform and steady flow 
- Two modelled events: 
  - Case 1: 143 m3/s in MC and 4.4 m3/s in TR. This case is Qmj minimum
  - Case 2: 219 m3/s in MC and 20 m3/s in TR. This case a non-exceedance frequency <0.1
- Generated true observed data : 2 Water surface elevations (WSE) 
  - Event 1: WSE in MC
  - Event 2: WSE in TR

```{r,fig.width = 6.5,fig.height = 4.5}
load(file.path(data_folder, "processed_data/Synthetic_case/Rhone/High_uncertainty/WSE_synthetic_Rhone.RData"))

Input_Typology <- list(
  Main_Reach = c(1, 2),
  Tributary = c(3)
)
Input_Model_Reach <- data.frame(
  reach = c(1, 2, 3),
  KP_start = c(55900, 34500, 19330),
  KP_end = c(34500, 26750, 202)
)

WSE_synthetic_simplified_raw_event_1 <- WSE_synthetic_simplified %>%
  filter(id_case == "Rhone_synt_Ev_1", id_reach_CAL %in% Input_Typology[[1]]) %>%
  mutate(
    id_reach = case_when(
      id_reach_CAL == 1 ~ "Main reach upstream",
      id_reach_CAL == 2 ~ "Main reach downstream",
      id_reach_CAL == 3 ~ "Tributary"
    ),
    event = 1,
    name_event = "Ev_1"
  )

WSE_synthetic_simplified_Cal_event_1 <- WSE_synthetic_simplified_raw_event_1 %>%
  group_by(id_reach_CAL) %>%
  # slice_sample(prop = 0.8) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(set = "calibration") %>%
  arrange(KP + id_reach_CAL) %>% # Because order is upstream to downstream and KP is increasing
  mutate(Reach_groupped_Cal = NA_character_)


WSE_Event_1 <- assign_calibration_and_validation_data(
  Input_Typology = Input_Typology,
  Input_Model_Reach = Input_Model_Reach,
  CalData = WSE_synthetic_simplified_Cal_event_1,
  All_observations = WSE_synthetic_simplified_raw_event_1
)

CalData_event_1 <- WSE_Event_1 %>% filter(set == "calibration")

#####################################################################
# Event 2: WSE in the tributary
#####################################################################

WSE_synthetic_simplified_raw_event_2 <- WSE_synthetic_simplified %>%
  filter(id_case == "Rhone_synt_Ev_2", id_reach_CAL %in% Input_Typology[[2]]) %>%
  mutate(
    id_reach = case_when(
      id_reach_CAL == 1 ~ "Main reach upstream",
      id_reach_CAL == 2 ~ "Main reach downstream",
      id_reach_CAL == 3 ~ "Tributary"
    ),
    event = 2,
    name_event = "Ev_2"
  )
#################################
set.seed(2026) #  # for reproducibility
# 1. Calibration set
WSE_synthetic_simplified_Cal_event_2 <- WSE_synthetic_simplified_raw_event_2 %>%
  group_by(id_reach_CAL) %>%
  # slice_sample(prop = 0.7) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(set = "calibration") %>%
  arrange(KP + id_reach_CAL) %>% # Because order is upstream to downstream and KP is increasing
  mutate(Reach_groupped_Cal = NA_character_)


WSE_Event_2 <- assign_calibration_and_validation_data(
  Input_Typology = Input_Typology,
  Input_Model_Reach = Input_Model_Reach,
  CalData = WSE_synthetic_simplified_Cal_event_2,
  All_observations = WSE_synthetic_simplified_raw_event_2
)

CalData_event_2 <- WSE_Event_2 %>% filter(set == "calibration")
WSE_data <- rbind(
  WSE_Event_1,
  WSE_Event_2
)
# All calibration data
observed_data <- rbind(
  CalData_event_1,
  CalData_event_2
)


ggplot(WSE_data, aes(x = KP)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = WSE_real_obs)) +
  # geom_point(aes(y = WSE,col=factor('perturbed')) )+
  # geom_errorbar(aes(
  #   ymin = WSE - qnorm(0.975) * Yu_WSE,
  #   ymax = WSE + qnorm(0.975) * Yu_WSE
  # )) +
  facet_wrap(~event,
    labeller = as_labeller(
      c(
        "1" = "Event~1:~Main~reach:~discharge~of~143~m^3/s",
        "2" = "Event~2:~Tributary:~discharge~of~20~m^3/s"
      ),
      label_parsed
    ),
    ncol = 1,
    scales = "free"
  ) +
  labs(
    y = "WSE",
    title = "Simulated WSE (true values)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13), # x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13), # y-axis title
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 1), # x-axis ticks
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12), # y-axis ticks
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 16,
      hjust = 0.5
    )
  )
```

Then, the true observed data are perturbed to obtain the observed data to use during calibration 
```{r,fig.width = 6.5,fig.height = 4.5}
WSE_high_u <- WSE_data %>%
  mutate(Yu_WSE = 0.05)

WSE_low_u <- WSE_data %>%
  mutate(Yu_WSE = 0.025)


ggplot(WSE_high_u, aes(x = KP)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = WSE, col = factor("Perturbed \n (0.05)")), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(
    ymin = WSE - qnorm(0.975) * Yu_WSE,
    ymax = WSE + qnorm(0.975) * Yu_WSE,
    color = factor("Perturbed \n (0.05)")
  ), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(data = WSE_low_u, aes(y = WSE, col = factor("Perturbed \n (0.025)")), alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = WSE_low_u,
    aes(
      ymin = WSE - qnorm(0.975) * Yu_WSE,
      ymax = WSE + qnorm(0.975) * Yu_WSE,
      color =  factor("Perturbed \n (0.025)")
    ), alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(y = WSE_real_obs, col = factor("True")), size = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~event,
    labeller = as_labeller(
      c(
        "1" = "Event~1:~Main~reach:~discharge~of~143~m^3/s",
        "2" = "Event~2:~Tributary:~discharge~of~20~m^3/s"
      ),
      label_parsed,
    ),
    ncol = 1,
    scales = "free"
  ) +
  labs(
    y = "WSE",
    title = "Generated observations",
    col = "Simulations"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13), # x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13), # y-axis title
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 1), # x-axis ticks
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12), # y-axis ticks
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 16,
      hjust = 0.5
    )
  )
```

## Estimation scenarios
All scenarios has pseudo observation of friction in the main channel. 

### Case 1: High uncertainty in WSE 
```{r,fig.width = 6.5,fig.height = 4.5}
case <- "2_WSE_u_high"
DIC <- "Piecewise_Kmin_n_0"
piecewise <- "Piecewise_Kmin_n_0_Q0"

# General
thalweg <- "plot_WSE_Thalweg.png"
Kmin <- "plot_Kmin.png"
plot_DIC <- "DIC.png"
Kmin_MAP_plot <- "BaM/post_traitement/plot_Kmin_with_true_values_generated_obs.png"
WSE_MAP_plot <- "BaM/post_traitement/plot_output_with_synthetic_data_Y1.png"
WSE_u_plot <- "BaM/post_traitement/sim_vs_obs_by_SU_WSE_with_uncertainties.png"

knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, thalweg))
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, Kmin))

knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, plot_DIC))
```

### Result (DIC): n= piecewise

```{r,fig.width = 4.5,fig.height = 3}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, DIC, Kmin_MAP_plot))

knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, DIC, WSE_MAP_plot))
# knitr::include_graphics("")
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, DIC, WSE_u_plot))
```


### Result (piecewise) without estimating Qin :

```{r,fig.width = 4.5,fig.height = 3, eval=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, piecewise, Kmin_MAP_plot))

knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, piecewise, WSE_MAP_plot))

knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, piecewise, WSE_u_plot))
```


### Case 2: Low uncertainty in WSE 
```{r,fig.width = 6.5,fig.height = 4.5}
case <- "2_WSE_u_low"
DIC <- "Piecewise_Kmin_n_0"
piecewise <- "Piecewise_Kmin_n_0_Q0"

knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, thalweg))
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, Kmin))
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, plot_DIC))
```

### Result (DIC): n= Piecewise_Kmin_n_0

```{r,fig.width = 4.5,fig.height = 3}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, DIC, Kmin_MAP_plot))
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, DIC, WSE_MAP_plot))
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, DIC, WSE_u_plot))
```


### Result (Piecewise_Kmin_n_0_Q0): Qin is not estimated

```{r,fig.width = 4.5,fig.height = 3}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, piecewise, Kmin_MAP_plot))
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, piecewise, WSE_MAP_plot))
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(main_folder, case, piecewise, WSE_u_plot))
```
